text: R53 Hosted Zones @ nmsieananitia © sstncon * A R53 Hosted Zone is a DNS DB for a domain e.g. animals4life.org ¢ Globally resilient (multiple DNS Servers) * Created with domain registration via R53 - can be created separately * Host DNS Records (e.g. A, AAAA, MX, NS, TXT ...) * Hosted Zones are what the DNS system references - Authoritative for a domain e.g. Animals4life.org
